channel.title: Jonathan's Bookmarks Digest
channel.description: A private, daily-ish audio digest of the things Jonathan bookmarks on X — read aloud and woven together by theme. ~95% bookmarked text, lightly narrated.
channel.itunes:author: Bookmarks Digest
channel.itunes:summary: A private, daily-ish audio digest of the things Jonathan bookmarks on X — read aloud and woven together by theme. ~95% bookmarked text, lightly narrated.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — Export Controls, SpaceX & the Middle East Deal
item.description:
Your bookmarks, read aloud and woven by theme.
Sources: • Andrew Curran: Dear Mr. Amodei:
The Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS),… — https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2066988824182624269 • Charlie Bullock: So, I've now read the "is informed" letter that Lutnick sent… — https://x.com/CharlieBull0ck/status/2066987766924128464 • Anthropic: Our latest economic research introduces a framework for trac… — https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2066969532380721386 • Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸: SpaceX & the Sentient Sun — https://x.com/pmarca/status/2066523671456579828 • Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷: My theory is that the American empire is JUST getting starte… — https://x.com/farzyness/status/2066336381429797375 • Amit Segal: “What we know is this agreement is going to make Israel safe… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066879462315085855 • Peter Yang: Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best AI builder… — https://x.com/petergyang/status/2066309730138726752
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:27 The Anthropic Export-Control Earthquake 07:51 SpaceX, Mars & American Power 16:31 The Middle East Deal 21:19 One for the Builders
item.content:encoded:
Your bookmarks, read aloud and woven by theme.
Sources: • Andrew Curran: Dear Mr. Amodei:
The Bureau of Industry and Security (BIS),… — https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2066988824182624269 • Charlie Bullock: So, I've now read the "is informed" letter that Lutnick sent… — https://x.com/CharlieBull0ck/status/2066987766924128464 • Anthropic: Our latest economic research introduces a framework for trac… — https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2066969532380721386 • Marc Andreessen 🇺🇸: SpaceX & the Sentient Sun — https://x.com/pmarca/status/2066523671456579828 • Farzad 🇺🇸 🇮🇷: My theory is that the American empire is JUST getting starte… — https://x.com/farzyness/status/2066336381429797375 • Amit Segal: “What we know is this agreement is going to make Israel safe… — https://x.com/AmitSegal/status/2066879462315085855 • Peter Yang: Every FREE agentic engineering tool from the best AI builder… — https://x.com/petergyang/status/2066309730138726752
Chapters: 00:00 Intro 00:27 The Anthropic Export-Control Earthquake 07:51 SpaceX, Mars & American Power 16:31 The Middle East Deal 21:19 One for the Builders
